name: google-calendar-event-creator
description: Chrome extension that creates a pre-filled Google Calendar event from the event details on the current web page.

scripts.test:offline: node --disable-warning=MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON --test extension-test/unit/extraction.test.js extension-test/unit/calendar-url.test.js extension-test/unit/source-request.test.js .github/workflows/tests/shipping-files.test.js dev/tools/test/load-order-generated.test.js extension-test/unit/load-order.test.js extension-test/unit/popup-content.test.js extension-test/unit/popup-truncation.test.js extension-test/unit/events-view.test.js dev/tools/test/triage-extractor-request.test.js dev/tools/test/attach-sample-url.test.js dev/tools/test/extractor-naming.test.js dev/tools/test/extractor-scaffold.test.js dev/tools/test/probe-challenge.test.js dev/tools/test/case-quality.test.js extension-test/unit/supported-domains.test.js dev/requirements/test/spa-shell.test.js dev/procedures/test/docs-reachable.test.js extension-test/extension/toolbar-icon-state.test.js extension-test/extension/toolbar-icon-paths.test.js extension-test/extension/extension-loads.test.js dev/tools/test/uber/shared-constants.test.js dev/requirements/product-requirements.test.js

_scriptNotes.--disable-warning=MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAG: Deliberate, reviewed suppression (issue #305). The popup's ES-module graph (extension/config.js, extension/fallback-policy.js, extension/events-popup/build-calendar-url.js, extension/events-popup/popup.js, extension/events-popup/views/*.js) is loaded as .js with no package.json "type" (the rest of the repo is CommonJS), so Node parses-as-CJS-then-reparses-as-ESM and warns on every test run. This is a Node-loader-only artifact: the shipped extension loads these via <script type="module"> in extension/events-popup/popup.html and Chrome never reads package.json, so nothing is wrong in production. Suppressing only this one code keeps other warnings visible (see the warnings rule in dev/procedures/claude/workflow.md). Applied only to the node invocations that import the ESM graph.

_dependencyNotes.jsdom: Test-only. Provides a DOM implementation (extension-test/harness.js) so the unmodified extractor scripts (extension/event-extractors/) can be run and asserted against in Node, exactly as they execute in a browser. Not shipped with the extension.
_dependencyNotes.satori: Test-only. Renders the popup's HTML/CSS-subset tree to SVG for UI snapshot tests (dev/requirements/infra/popup-renderer.js), since it isn't a real screenshot of the popup.
_dependencyNotes.@resvg/resvg-js: Test-only. Rasterizes the SVG produced by satori into a PNG for UI snapshot tests (dev/requirements/infra/popup-renderer.js).
_dependencyNotes.pngjs: Test-only. Decodes/encodes the PNG snapshots compared in the UI tests (dev/requirements/ui/popup-snapshots.test.js).
_dependencyNotes.pixelmatch: Test-only. Performs pixel-level diffing between rendered and reference PNGs in the UI tests (dev/requirements/ui/popup-snapshots.test.js).
